macro makeCounter()
  let count = 0
  macro()
    set count += 1
    $count
  end
end

let counter = $makeCounter()
$counter()
$counter()

✓ Setter getter

Code


macro createBox()
  let value = 0
  _set: macro(v)
    set value = $v
  end
  _get: macro()
    $value
  end
end

let box = $createBox()
$box._set(42)
$box._get()

Output


5
✓ rec

Code


macro rec(n)
   if n==0
      macro(x)
         $x
      end
   else
      let f_rec = $rec($(n-1))
      macro(x)
         run $(print(x))
         $(n * f_rec(x))
      end
   end
end

let f = $rec(3)
$f(2)

Bytecode

✓ iterator (iter)

Code


let first5 = @table
  meta iter: macro()
    parent: $self
    state: 1
    meta next: macro()
      if self.state <= 5
        $self.state
        set self.state += 1
      end
    end
  end
end

for i in first5
  $i
end

Bytecode

002 FILE_INIT_PARAMS 0 0

✓ iterator (next)

Code


macro seq(a, b)
  state: $a
  stop: $b
  meta next: macro()
    if self.state <= self.stop
      $self.state
      set self.state += 1
    end
  end
end

for i in seq(1, 5)
  $i
end

Bytecode

while i<4
  set i = $(i+1)
  Iterate $i times...\n

  if flag

  else
    sing
  end
end

✓ Leave macro (text)

Code


let t = @table
  - blue
  - red
  - green
end

macro index(t, y)
  for i in seq(1, len(t))
    if t[i] == y
      $i
      leave
    end
  end
end

$index($t, red)

✓ Variadic 1

Code


macro write(...args)
  Positionals args: $join(...args, sep:\,\s)\n
  Named args:\s
  @table.join(sep:\,\s)
    for key, value in items(args, ?named)
      - $key\=$value
    end
  end
end
$write(write, paint, song, ink: quill, wing: mark)

✓ items ?named

Code


let t = $table(wing: quill, write, song)
for k, v in items(t)
  $k → $v\n
end
---\n
for k, v in items(t, ?named)
  $k → $v\n
end

Code


macro css(selector, ...style)
	for item in items(style)
	end
end

macro Document(body)
	@css(a)
		margin: 0
	end
end

@Document
	aaaaaaaaaaaaa
end

Code


macro List(...items)
    let count = 0
    for item in items
        set count += 1
        $count)$item\n
    end
end

@List
    - mark
    - paint
    - sing
end

macro wing(x)
    set x.y = $table()
end
macro nib()
    y: $empty

    meta call: macro()
        if not self.y
            $(wing(self))
        end

        a
    end
end

Code


macro Vect(x, y)
    x: $x
    y: $y
    meta add: macro(_, v)
        @Vect
            - $(self.x + v.x)
            - $(self.y + v.y)
        end
    end
end
    
with locale: none
    let A = $Vect(1, 0.5) 
    let B = $Vect(7, 0.5)
    $(A+B)
end
